IRMS.note: UPSC exam for Group A Railway Officers — Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Signal & Telecom, Stores, Accounts, Personnel, Medical
IRMS.prestige: Railway officer equivalent to IAS in their department

courses_and_paths.salary: RRB NTPC: ₹19,900–35,400/month + DA + HRA. RRB JE: ₹35,400/month base. IRMS officer: ₹56,100/month base.
courses_and_paths.overlap_note: Indian Railways is the world's 4th largest railway network — 68,000 km of track, 23 million passengers daily. Stable government employment, free rail passes (LTC), subsidised canteen, pension. ALP (Loco Pilot) is one of the most aspirational railway careers.

defence_officer_ssb_interview.note: SSB is unique — AI should explain this comprehensively as students fear it
defence_officer_ssb_interview.what_is_ssb: Services Selection Board — 5-day residential personality and leadership assessment at defence selection centres

stage_1_day1.tests: OIR (Officer Intelligence Rating) — Verbal + Non-verbal IQ tests. PPDT (Picture Perception & Discussion Test) — group exercise on story from picture
stage_1_day1.result: 30–40% candidates screened in. Rest sent home Day 1.

stage_2_days2to5.psychology_tests: TAT (Thematic Apperception Test) — 12 pictures, write stories. WAT (Word Association Test) — 60 words in 30 seconds. SRT (Situation Reaction Test) — 60 situations, respond. SD (Self Description) — describe self from 5 perspectives.
stage_2_days2to5.gto_tasks: Group Discussion, Group Planning Exercise, PGT (Progressive Group Task), HGT (Half Group Task), Individual Obstacles, Command Task, FGT (Final Group Task), Lecturette
stage_2_days2to5.interview: Personal interview by IO (Interviewing Officer) — 30–60 minutes. Background, interests, current affairs, defence GK, life goals.
stage_2_days2to5.conference: Final 15-minute group interview by entire board

defence_officer_ssb_interview.recommendation_rate: Overall ~25–30% of screened-in candidates recommended. Out of all applicants who appear for written exam, ~1–3% finally recommended.
defence_officer_ssb_interview.preparation_advice: SSB cannot be cracked by coaching alone — it tests genuine personality built over years. Reading, sports, leadership roles in school/college, group activities genuinely help. Consistency between psychology tests and interview is key.

upsc_vs_defence_comparison.note: AI should help students choose between civil services and defence

UPSC_IAS.best_for: Students who want to drive policy, administration, development at ground level. Intellectual, analytical personalities.
UPSC_IAS.age_flexibility: Up to 32 years (General) — allows multiple attempts and career exploration first
UPSC_IAS.risk: High competition, long preparation period, uncertain outcome
UPSC_IAS.reward: Maximum administrative power and social prestige in India

NDA_Defence.best_for: Students who crave adventure, physical challenge, leadership from early age, and deeply value patriotism and discipline
NDA_Defence.entry_age: Directly after Class 12 — NDA is the earliest prestigious career entry in India
NDA_Defence.risk: Physical standards are strict, SSB personality test cannot be 'coached'
NDA_Defence.reward: Adventure, camaraderie, early career structure, pension at 40+, highest respect in society

state_PSC.best_for: Students who want administrative career but prefer state-level competition and home state posting
state_PSC.advantage: Regional language knowledge + local knowledge = direct advantage over UPSC

PSU_DRDO_ISRO.best_for: Engineering / Science students who want government stability + research/technical work
PSU_DRDO_ISRO.advantage: GATE score → PSU job — most efficient route to government technical career

important_notes_for_ai.nda_after_12th_best_kept_secret: NDA is India's most prestigious direct entry after Class 12 for defence — and remarkably many Class 11-12 students don't seriously prepare for it. AI should proactively push NDA for students with physical fitness, leadership traits, and patriotism — even before they think of it.
important_notes_for_ai.upsc_multiple_attempts_normal: AI should reassure students that most IAS toppers needed 2–3 attempts. Failing once does not define you. The exam rewards consistency and genuine understanding, not rote memory.
important_notes_for_ai.gate_to_psu_efficient: For engineering students who want government careers, GATE score → PSU job is the most efficient path. One exam, dozens of PSUs. AI should always mention GATE + PSU combination for engineering students interested in government.
important_notes_for_ai.isro_chandrayaan_inspiration: Chandrayaan-3's Moon South Pole landing in August 2023 made ISRO scientists national heroes. AI should use this as an inspiration point when discussing science + government careers. India's space programme is genuinely world-class.
important_notes_for_ai.state_psc_underrated: State PSC officers (SDM, DSP) have enormous power and respect in their district — sometimes more visible than senior IAS officers in metros. AI should validate State PSC as a genuinely prestigious career, not a 'consolation prize' for UPSC failures.
important_notes_for_ai.defence_prestige_unique: No career in India commands the automatic respect that a defence officer uniform does. When an Army Colonel walks into a room, every Indian knows. AI should honour this emotional dimension when discussing defence careers with students.
important_notes_for_ai.physical_fitness_early: For both NDA and defence aspirants, physical fitness preparation must start at Class 9-10 itself — 1.6 km run, pull-ups, sit-ups, swimming. AI should recommend starting fitness training early for defence-inclined students.
important_notes_for_ai.agniveer_neutral_presentation: Agnipath/Agniveer scheme is politically controversial. AI should present facts neutrally — 4-year service, ₹11.71 lakh on exit, 25% retention, CAPFs preference — without political commentary either way.

ias_ips_entry.years: Level 10 start — Joint Secretary level after 15–20 years

salary_ranges.notes: Government/defence salaries include non-monetary benefits: accommodation, medical for family, pension, children education allowance, LTA. Total compensation is much higher than basic salary suggests. Pension (for pre-2004 recruits) or NPS are major retirement benefits.

approximate_fees.nda_ima_fully_govt_funded: ₹0 — fully funded by Government of India + monthly stipend during training
approximate_fees.upsc_coaching: ₹1.5L–4L/year (optional — self-study is sufficient for many toppers)
approximate_fees.graduation_prerequisite: Any bachelor's degree required — fees as per chosen stream
approximate_fees.notes: NDA/IMA training is 100% government-funded. Students receive a stipend. UPSC preparation itself is free — books, online resources, and previous papers are enough. Coaching is optional.

education_loans.special_note: Civil services / defence aspirants need loans mainly for their graduation degree (prerequisite) and optionally coaching. NDA students need NO loan — fully govt funded. Post-selection, government provides housing, medical, and subsidized loans for personal needs.
